# FlexForce.ai

> The AI hiring manager for small home service businesses. Calls every applicant in 60 seconds, screens them in English or Spanish, verifies state licenses, and books interviews — so small HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and roofing contractors stop losing qualified candidates to slow follow-up.

## Key facts

- Pricing: $299/mo (Starter), $599/mo (Growth), $999/mo (Premium)
- Trades supported: HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing
- States covered: Texas, New Jersey, Utah, Connecticut, New York
- Founder: Jack (solo founder; no team, no agency)
- Free 30-day pilot, no card required
- Bilingual screening (English + Spanish) included on all plans
- Automated state license verification (TDLR, NJ DCA, Utah DOPL, CT DCP, NYS / NYC DOB)

## Documentation

- [Strategy doc](https://flexforce.ai/docs/strategy.html): full positioning, ICP, expansion thesis
- [How it works](https://flexforce.ai/#how): 3-step workflow
- [Pricing](https://flexforce.ai/#pricing): three plans
- [Apply demo](https://flexforce.ai/apply.html): live candidate-experience demo

## Trade hubs

- [HVAC hiring](https://flexforce.ai/trades/hvac/): hire HVAC technicians fast — AI screening + state license verify
- [Plumbing hiring](https://flexforce.ai/trades/plumbing/): hire plumbers fast — bilingual screening, license verify, fast interview booking
- [Electrical hiring](https://flexforce.ai/trades/electrical/): hire electricians fast — driven by EV charger, solar interconnect, panel upgrade demand
- [Roofing hiring](https://flexforce.ai/trades/roofing/): hire roofers fast — bilingual screening, storm-response crew building

## State hubs

- [Texas](https://flexforce.ai/states/texas/): trades hiring across Houston, Dallas, Austin — TDLR license verification, bilingual screening
- [New Jersey](https://flexforce.ai/states/new-jersey/): trades hiring across Newark, Jersey City, Paterson — NJ DCA license, lead-pipe replacement work
- [Utah](https://flexforce.ai/states/utah/): trades hiring across SLC, Provo, Ogden — DOPL license, Silicon Slopes commercial work
- [Connecticut](https://flexforce.ai/states/connecticut/): trades hiring across Bridgeport, Hartford, New Haven — CT DCP license, heat-pump conversion surge
- [New York](https://flexforce.ai/states/new-york/): trades hiring across NYC, Buffalo, Rochester — NYS/NYC DOB license, Local Law 97 retrofits

## Guides

- [How to hire an HVAC technician fast](https://flexforce.ai/guides/how-to-hire-hvac-technician-fast/): response-time data, screening checklist, license verification, ROI math
- [Spanish-speaking trades recruiting playbook](https://flexforce.ai/guides/spanish-speaking-trades-recruiting/): how to hire bilingual trades without a bilingual recruiter
- [Why trades applicants ghost](https://flexforce.ai/guides/why-trades-applicants-ghost/): the 3 reasons and the single lever that fixes it
- [2026 skilled trades labor shortage report](https://flexforce.ai/guides/2026-skilled-trades-labor-shortage-report/): brief on the 350k worker gap
- [Cost to hire a licensed tradesperson](https://flexforce.ai/guides/cost-to-hire-a-licensed-tradesperson/): full cost math, ROI on automation

## Comparisons

- [FlexForce vs Indeed](https://flexforce.ai/compare/flexforce-vs-indeed/): why most small contractors use both — Indeed sources, FlexForce screens
- [FlexForce vs ServiceTitan recruiting](https://flexforce.ai/compare/flexforce-vs-servicetitan-recruiting/): when to use each, when to run both
- [FlexForce vs Workrise](https://flexforce.ai/compare/flexforce-vs-workrise/): different problems — gig labor vs employee hiring
- [FlexForce vs in-house recruiter](https://flexforce.ai/compare/flexforce-vs-in-house-recruiter/): cost math and trade-offs

## Reports

- [2026 Skilled Trades Hiring Report](https://flexforce.ai/reports/2026-skilled-trades-hiring-report/): full original-data report — 350k worker gap, response-time data, cost-to-hire math, state-by-state pressure analysis. Free + citable.
